map.skillRadarCoachLF5: database integrity is at risk we must normalize relations
map.skillRadarCoachLF6: app architecture shows gaps we must refactor the code
map.skillRadarCoachLF7: cyber threat flagged we must patch security systems now

dossier.title: Technical dossier
dossier.subtitle: Examiner-facing overview — production web techniques in this PWA and how learning and evidence stay protected
dossier.vitalsFootnote: Measured in the live Nexus UI — target responsive LCP and interaction under showcase load despite the effect stack
dossier.cloudBlurb: Only the sealed .nxc payload may leave the device — offline-first remains the default
dossier.healthBlurb: Validates all 12 learning fields (curriculum + registry) plus an AES-GCM roundtrip — ideal before a live demo

pillars.title: Spaced repetition · Ebbinghaus
pillars.body: Exercises move through Leitner boxes with growing intervals — estimated retention R(t) drives selection so weak cards appear more often and strong cards less
pillars.detail: The picker (Leitner weights) is swappable at runtime — different review strategies without UI churn

pillars.title: AES-GCM-256 · Certificates
pillars.body: The Nexus master dossier is sealed client-side with AES-GCM-256 — authenticated symmetric crypto without persisting exam evidence in plaintext
pillars.detail: Web Crypto wraps key material and encryption behind a small surface area

pillars.title: PWA · Service worker
pillars.body: Offline-first shell: static assets and core bundles are precached — the arena stays usable on flaky links and resyncs on reconnect
pillars.detail: Service worker lifecycle reacts to messages and fetch events — loosely coupled updates

pillars.title: Web Audio API
pillars.body: Boss stingers, impact frames and menu ambience use the Web Audio API — procedural layers and ducking without heavy sample stacks
pillars.detail: Nodes compose a graph; stingers are short command sequences rather than monolithic players

slideshow.title: Architecture presentation
slideshow.hint: Escape or close — return to the live app

slides.title: Nexus Path — PWA as exam arena
slides.body: An installable progressive web app combines vocational curriculum, Leitner scheduling and a combat feedback loop — learning stays offline-capable and auditable

slides.title: Observer, strategy, facade
slides.body: Store subscriptions and vitals decouple measurement from render. Swappable strategies drive audio, presets and sync. Sealing and cloud adapters hide cryptographic complexity

slides.title: AES-GCM-256 in the browser
slides.body: The master dossier uses authenticated encryption with a random IV — tampering fails decryption; plaintext never leaves the envelope unsealed

slides.title: Spaced repetition
slides.body: Ebbinghaus-style retention and Leitner boxes decide which exercise is due next — less forgetting, measurable progress

slides.title: CI/CD quality gate
slides.body: GitHub Actions runs Vitest and a production build on every push — mathematical and crypto cores stay regression-safe

slides.title: Back to the live app
slides.body: Close the deck and show map, terminal and dossier in motion — combat state persists via the global store
